status: UNCALIBRATED_RESEARCH — objective contract for the HL/HCS loop; no client probability; nothing here is a forecast or a recommendation
objective_rule: HL/HCS optimizes THIS VECTOR — never a single backtest return. calibration/constraints/stability are guards (must not degrade); hypervolume + goal metrics are the growth axes.
